title: Roadmap: retrieval ranking — recency + provenance-weighted scoring over bare FTS
context: Agent-observed: FTS finds records but ranks them badly — 'work on the wiki' ranked the release runbook above the wiki runbook written minutes earlier; hunch_runbook('add a CLI subcommand') surfaced nothing relevant. When ranking misses, agents fall back to grep — the exact failure hunch exists to prevent.
decision: Blend FTS score with recency (valid_from decay), provenance weight (human_confirmed > llm_draft), and trigger-phrase exact-match boosts for runbooks; evaluate against the golden set in hunch eval before/after.
